source.heading: Images
source.info: All images in this folder and its subfolders will be processed

watermark.heading: Watermark
watermark.info: Choose the image file to use as watermark. By default, the watermark will be placed in the bottom right corner

destination.heading: Destination
destination.info: The processed images will be saved in this folder. The exact location in this folder will be determined by the filename format and the parameters that you can set below.

filenameFormat.heading: Filename format
filenameFormat.info: The processed images will be saved with filenames that follow this format. You can use the following placeholders: {folder}, {filename}, {number}, {status} and {original}. The first three values can be set in the Inspector panel; {original} is the original input filename and cannot be edited. The {status} value will be 'watermarked' if the image is marked or 'original' if the image is kept unmarked. For example, if the filename format is '{folder}\\{status}\\{filename}_{number}', the processed images will be saved in subfolders of the destination folder named 'watermarked' and 'original'. Use a single backslash to separate folders.

anchorPoint.heading: Anchor Point
anchorPoint.info: The point on the watermark image that will be used as the reference point for positioning the watermark on the photo. For example, if you choose 'Bottom Right', the bottom right corner of the watermark will be placed at the position determined by the horizontal and vertical offsets.

leftFraction.heading: Horizontal Offset
leftFraction.info: The fraction of the image width that determines the distance from the left edge of the image to the anchor point of the watermark. For example, 90% means that the anchor point of the watermark will be placed at 90% of the image width from the left edge.

topFraction.heading: Vertical Offset
topFraction.info: The fraction of the image height that determines the distance from the top edge of the image to the anchor point of the watermark. For example, 90% means that the anchor point of the watermark will be placed at 90% of the image height from the top edge.

widthFraction.heading: Watermark Width
widthFraction.info: The fraction of the image width that determines the width of the watermark. The value must be between 0 and 1. For example, 10% means that the width of the watermark will be 10% of the image width.

shortcutsDescription: Allows you to use keyboard shortcuts to process images.
